title: Lexend Font
description: [REQUIRES CAXTON] Changes the ASCII font to Lexend.
body:
This resource pack makes most used ASCII characters look like from the Lexend font. I am not the owner of these fonts.

![The font's preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66abf7d1b3403c82624c146ef9cb71db6c0d056a.png)

**Credits:**
Lexend project authors - Lexend regular & bold creators
Richard Hriech - Lexend regular italic & bold italic creator

Same credits & Lexend's license present in the resource pack files.
